basic_details.job_title: IIGM Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Geomagnetism (IIGM) has published the Young Professional Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Young Professional positions in various disciplines. Candidates holding qualifications such as PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism & Mass Communication/Public Relations/Media Science, Law Degree, Master’s Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences, Instrumentation/Applied Physics, or MBA/Public Administration are eligible to apply through email mode at the official website iigm.res.in. The application process will remain active until

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism and Mass communication/Public Relations/Media Science, Degree in Law, Master's Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences, Master's Degree in Instrumentation/Physics/Applied Physics/Geophysics, Masters in Business Administration (HR, Finance)/Public Administration
qualification.details: Public Relations (Outreach & Media): PG Degree/PG Diploma in Journalism and Mass communication/Public Relations/Media Science etc. with Minimum 2 years experience. Legal: Degree in Law from a recognized university with Minimum 2 years experience. Scientific Research: Master's Degree in Physics/Geophysics/Geology/Atmospheric Sciences/Physical Sciences with at least 60% marks and Two years research experience in a relevant subject after completion of Master's degree. Technical: Master's Degree in Instrumentation/Physics/Applied Physics/Geophysics with at least 55% marks and Minimum Two years experience in a research organization in a relevant field. Administration: Masters in Business Administration (HR, Finance)/Public Administration with Minimum two years experience in Govt. Organization in a relevant field.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIGM Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIGM Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIGM Young Professional recruitment is 07-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Young Professional post across various specializations like Public Relations, Legal, Scientific Research, Technical, and Administration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for IIGM Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIGM Young Professional posts as per the available information.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, including PG degrees/diplomas in Journalism, Law degrees, Master's degrees in Physics, Geophysics, Geology, Atmospheric Sciences, Instrumentation, and MBA in HR/Finance or Public Administration.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these Young Professional positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Young Professional positions is contract-based.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Indian Institute of Geomagnetism located?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Geomagnetism (IIGM) is located in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum experience required for most of the Young Professional posts?
faq.answer: For most of the Young Professional posts, a minimum of two years of experience in a relevant field is required, as specified in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra. While not explicitly stated, candidates from other states are generally eligible for government jobs unless specific domicile restrictions apply, which should be checked in the official PDF.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IIGM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
